session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report what passes and what fails.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check build, tests, and linting

=================================== FAILURES =================================== errors: list[str] = [] errors.append(f"{workflow_file.name}: name '{name}' != expected '{expected_name}'") if errors: > raise AssertionError("Workflow name/filename mismatches:\n " + "\n ".join(errors)) E AssertionError: Workflow name/filename mismatches: tests/unit/workflows/test_workflow_names.py:99: AssertionError FAILED tests/unit/workflows/test_workflow_names.py::test_workflow_names_match_filenames - AssertionError: Workflow name/filename mismatches: 1 failed, 5644 passed in 22.46s
session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**Status: FAILED**
### Summary The fast-ci target ran multiple checks with mostly successful results, but **one test failure** caused the overall failure:
### Detailed Results
**Passed:** - Linting (ruff): PASSED - Format Check: PASSED (1614 files already formatted) - Markdown Check: PASSED - Exec Reference Check: PASSED - Type checking (ty): PASSED - Unit Tests (erk-dev): PASSED (136 passed) - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): PASSED (115 passed) - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): PASSED (24 tests)
**Prettier Warning (non-blocking):** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Failed:** - Unit Tests (erk): **1 FAILED, 5644 PASSED**
### Test Failure Details
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/workflows/test_workflow_names.py`
**Test:** `test_workflow_names_match_filenames`
**Error:** Workflow name/filename mismatch: ``` code-reviews-trigger.yml: name 'code-reviews' != expected 'code-reviews-trigger' ```
The workflow file is named `code-reviews-trigger.yml` but its internal `name:` field is set to `code-reviews` instead of `code-reviews-trigger`.
